name: SecurityTrails
description: SecurityTrails provides comprehensive domain, DNS, IP, and WHOIS intelligence with historical data. Enables attack surface discovery, subdomain enumeration, and infrastructure mapping for threat investigations.

actions.name: Get Domain Details
actions.description: Retrieve current DNS records and domain information including A, AAAA, MX, NS, SOA, and TXT records for a given domain.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to look up (e.g., 'example.com')

actions.name: List Subdomains
actions.description: Enumerate all known subdomains for a given domain from SecurityTrails' comprehensive subdomain database.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to list subdomains for

parameters.name: children_only
parameters.description: Return only direct child subdomains (default: false)

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: Include subdomains that no longer resolve (default: true)

actions.name: Get Domain WHOIS
actions.description: Retrieve current WHOIS registration data for a domain including registrant information, registrar, creation and expiration dates.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to get WHOIS data for

actions.name: Get Associated Domains
actions.description: Find domains related to a given hostname through shared registrant information, name servers, mail servers, or other infrastructure.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to find associated domains for

actions.name: Get DNS History
actions.description: Retrieve historical DNS records for a domain showing how its DNS configuration has changed over time, filtered by record type.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to get DNS history for

actions.name: Get WHOIS History
actions.description: Access historical WHOIS records for a domain showing ownership changes, registrar transfers, and contact information modifications over time.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The domain name to get WHOIS history for

actions.name: Get IP WHOIS
actions.description: Retrieve WHOIS registration information for an IP address including network block, ASN, organization, and allocation details.

parameters.name: ipaddress
parameters.description: The IP address to get WHOIS data for

actions.name: Get IP Neighbors
actions.description: Explore nearby IP addresses in the same network range to discover related infrastructure and neighboring hosts.

parameters.name: ipaddress
parameters.description: The IP address to explore neighbors for
